title: The Situation In The South
author: Chinese Political Cartoons
note: A political cartoon from China examining geopolitical dynamics and the shifting power balance in the Global South. Sharp visual commentary on how different nations navigate between great powers.

title: On Celebration and Existence
author: Osho
note: I don't think existence wants you to be serious. I have not seen a serious tree. I have not seen a serious bird. I have not seen a serious sunrise. I have not seen a serious starry night. It seems they are all laughing in their own ways, dancing in their own ways. We may not understand it, but there is a subtle feeling that the whole existence is a celebration.
